tasks.label: Backend
tasks.command: $existingProcIds = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach ($procId in $existingProcIds) { taskkill /F /PID $procId *> $null }; $global:LASTEXITCODE = 0; Start-Sleep 2; Set-Location D:\LKB-hot-monitor\server; node .\index.js
